subcodes.first_line: We make mention of the friends in that land, with a remembrance that is everlasting and eternal [3.5s]... ...We prescribe unto all men that which will lead to the exaltation of the Word of God amongst His servants
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوستان آن ارض را ذکر نموده و مینمائیم بذکری که باقی و دائمست
